assertions.title: ATS-only excludes browser/grounded execution

steps.observed: Run reached terminal state 'failed' with error: Failed to refresh Google OAuth token

steps.action: Verify sources array shows ATS lanes but not grounded_web
steps.expected: Sources evidence of ATS execution and grounded_web exclusion
steps.observed: Cannot verify - sources array is empty [] due to early OAuth failure

terminalStatus.message: Discovery failed — worker could not finish the run.

assertions.issues: Blocked by expired OAuth token. The run failed before any source execution could occur. Cannot verify routing enforcement without sources executing.

blockers.description: Google OAuth token has expired and refresh fails with 'invalid_grant'. The run fails at credential refresh before source execution, preventing verification of routing enforcement.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Unable to refresh OAuth token without user re-authentication. The token file at ~/.hermes/google_token.json contains a refresh_token but Google rejected the refresh attempt.

summary: VAL-ROUTE-002 is blocked. Webhook request with sourcePreset: 'ats_only' was correctly accepted (runId: run_2c9f36faacd04ab7b881278e8ec74cf1), but the run failed before source execution due to expired OAuth token. Cannot verify that ATS lanes executed without grounded_web because sources array is empty []. OAuth token requires user re-authentication to refresh.
